Citykart Brand Identity Refresh — Visual System & CGI Campaigns by Tara Devi
3.5-year brand identity overhaul for Citykart — new typography, colour system, brand guidelines, and CGI-elevated campaign films rolled out across 200+ stores.
Citykart Rebrand, Brand Identity, CGI Fashion, Design System, Visual Identity, Retail Branding, Tara Devi

Spearheaded a comprehensive brand identity refresh for Citykart over 3.5 years, defining the visual language across in-store, digital, and campaign materials. Used CGI and VFX to elevate campaign films beyond conventional retail aesthetics.
Audited existing brand assets and identified inconsistencies across touchpoints
Defined a new visual language — typography, colour system, and iconography
Created brand guidelines and handed off to in-house and agency teams
Supervised rollout across 200+ stores and all digital channels
Differentiated Citykart from competitors by leaning into bold, locally resonant visual storytelling
Used CGI and VFX to achieve premium aesthetics on a mid-market budget
Built a scalable design system to ensure brand consistency at every scale

Myntra Festive Campaign 2024 — AI-Integrated Fashion Campaign by Tara Devi
End-to-end creative direction for Myntra's 2024 festive campaign — blending AI-generated environments with live model shoots across Instagram, app banners, and print.
Myntra Festive 2024, AI Fashion Campaign, AI Photoshoot, Jewel-tone Campaign, Art Direction, Tara Devi

Led the end-to-end creative direction for Myntra's festive campaign, from concept development to final delivery. Integrated AI-generated backgrounds with live model shoots to create a cohesive, high-impact visual narrative across digital and print platforms.
Conducted mood-board research and trend analysis for the festive season
Developed concept brief aligning with Myntra's brand identity and campaign goals
Coordinated AI background generation pipeline alongside live model shoot schedules
Managed cross-functional teams across photography, post-production, and digital delivery
Positioned the campaign around warmth and celebration using a rich jewel-tone palette
Blended AI-generated environments with real talent to cut production time by 30%
Rolled out assets across Instagram, app banners, and print simultaneously for maximum reach

Winter Campaign: Global Aesthetic Scaling
A "luxury-to-mass" winter campaign bridging global aesthetics with high-volume social storytelling..

https://drive.google.com
Creative Strategy
Production Management
Content Scaling
AI & VFX Fashion Film — Experimental Short by Tara Devi
Experimental short fashion film using Midjourney, Runway, and DaVinci Resolve to blur the boundary between AI-generated imagery and live cinematography.
AI Fashion Film, VFX Film, Midjourney, Runway ML, Experimental Cinematography, Short Film, Tara Devi
Conceptualized visual mood boards and storyboards, defining the aesthetic direction, lighting references, and color stories for the entire winter season.
Collaborated with Art Directors and Photographers to translate brand concepts into high-impact visual assets, ensuring every shot met the campaign's creative brief.
Curated and mapped 200+ outfits, managing the technical "flat lay" and "on-model" styling to ensure consistency across the digital lookbook.
Led model scouting and talent selection, personally vetting and casting talent that embodied the brand’s winter persona.
Directed on-site location scouting, identifying and securing environments that aligned with the storyboard's atmospheric requirements.
Orchestrated the production of 100+ creative assets, overseeing the transition from raw footage to social-optimized reels with a focus on high-retention hooks.
Managed the end-to-end creative workflow, from initial outfit planning and artist briefings to final post-production and asset delivery.

Elevated the brand’s perception in Tier 2, 3, and 4 markets by benchmarking art direction against global luxury standards, effectively bridging the gap between high-end international aesthetics and local accessibility.

Strategized the use of foreign talent and premium styling to offer a "window into luxury" for regional audiences, differentiating the brand from the utilitarian imagery typically used by competitors in these territories.
Produced 100+ creative assets to fuel an aggressive social calendar, ensuring the brand dominated the "share of voice" on platforms like Instagram and Facebook during the peak winter shopping window.
Designed a dual-track shooting workflow that enabled the simultaneous capture of cinematic brand reels and an editorial photoshoot, maximizing asset output without doubling production time.

Curated a specific "look and feel" that combined high-fashion foreign model casting with relatable winter styling, creating a unique "Global-Local" (Glocal) identity that felt both premium and reachable for regional consumers.
Cleverly utilized high-end art direction and foreign casting to "price up" the brand’s perception, allowing a mid-market product to compete for the psychological mindshare of a luxury consumer.
Architected a high-gloss visual narrative that suggested an international budget while maintaining a lean, high-output production model—forcing competitors to overspend to match our visual standard.

Script to Screen: Citykart Campaign Reels — Directed by Tara Devi
Full-cycle seasonal campaign reels for Citykart — scripted, cast, directed, and delivered from scratch, optimised for Instagram Reels and YouTube Shorts.
Campaign Reels, Script Writing, Fashion Reels, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, Citykart Campaigns, Tara Devi
Conceived, scripted, and directed a series of campaign reels for Citykart's seasonal launches. Managed full production cycles including casting, set design, styling, and post-production.
Wrote scripts aligned with seasonal themes and campaign messaging
Held casting calls and coordinated with styling and set design teams
Directed on-set shoots across 4 seasonal campaigns in a single year
Oversaw editing, colour grading, and music licensing for final delivery
Kept each reel under 60 seconds to optimise for Instagram and YouTube Shorts
Used narrative arcs (problem → aspiration → resolution) to drive emotional engagement
A/B tested thumbnails and captions to maximise organic reach
